name: DNSx
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Fast and multi-purpose DNS toolkit from ProjectDiscovery. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: A Go binary: `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/dnsx/cmd/dnsx@latest`, or install from the AUR (`yay -S dnsx`). See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
